data.content: 1. Core acceptance-field work is implemented and validated: temporary checkout of knots-2412-acceptance-field passed make sanity with 95.18% coverage. 2. The parent knot description also requires foolery knots-backend changes to replace the Acceptance Criteria note shim and read acceptance back in toBeat(). 3. No foolery/knots-backend sources or shim replacement exist in this repository/branch, so the reviewed implementation does not satisfy the full knot description and cannot be approved at implementation_review.
